name: rDNA_chrIII_right_array
description: Right-end rDNA tandem array on S. pombe chromosome III. Symmetric counterpart of the left-end array; ~10.4 kb 35S units in tandem. Subject to recombination-mediated copy-number drift and to gene conversion that homogenises units within and between the two arrays.
expected_copy_count: ~50-75 copies of the 10.4 kb 35S unit in this array (~100-150 copies total across both chrIII arrays)
